basic_details.job_title: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 32 Para Pump Operator, Multipurpose Worker and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Para Pump Operator, Multipurpose Worker and More

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Middle (8th) Pass, Matriculation (10th) with ITI certificate in electrician/wireman/diesel mechanic/pump mechanic/motor mechanic/pump operator cum mechanic, Matriculation (10th) with ITI certificate in Fitter/Plumber
qualification.details: Multipurpose Worker: Middle (8th) Pass and its equivalent from a school duly recognized by the State Government. Para Pump Operator: Matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the trade of electrician/wireman/diesel mechanic/pump mechanic/motor mechanic/pump operator cum mechanic from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the above-cited trades under the Skill Development Scheme of the Government. Para Fitter: Matriculation (10th) with an ITI certificate in the trade of Fitter/Plumber from a recognized ITI/institute OR Matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the above-cited trades under the Skill Development Scheme of the Government.

salary_details.details: Multipurpose Worker: Rs. 5500/- PM Para Pump Operator: Rs. 6600/- PM Para Fitter: Rs. 6600/- PM

selection_process: Shortlisting Skill Test Physical Test Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30 June 2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Multipurpose Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Multipurpose Worker post, candidates must have passed Middle (8th) standard or its equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government.

faq.question: Q4. What are the ITI trades required for the Para Pump Operator post?
faq.answer: For the Para Pump Operator post, candidates need an ITI certificate in electrician, wireman, diesel mechanic, pump mechanic, motor mechanic, or pump operator cum mechanic trades.

faq.question: Q5. What are the ITI trades required for the Para Fitter post?
faq.answer: For the Para Fitter post, candidates require an ITI certificate in Fitter or Plumber trades.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released by Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag?
faq.answer: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag has released a total of 32 vacancies for the posts of Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of candidates, followed by a skill test, physical test, and finally, the preparation of a merit list.

faq.question: Q9. How can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag. The link will be provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered varies by post: Rs. 5500/- PM for Multipurpose Worker and Rs. 6600/- PM for Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter.
